section_name: Application for Wholesale Motor Vehicle Auction General Distinguishing Number
text:
(a) An applicant for an original or renewal wholesale motor vehicle auction general distinguishing number must submit to the department an application that contains:

(1) the information required by the department;

(2) information that demonstrates the person meets the requirements prescribed by Section 503.032 (Established and Permanent Place of Business) ; and

(3) information that demonstrates the applicant has complied with all applicable state laws and municipal ordinances.

(b) Repealed by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135, Sec. 140(2), eff. September 1, 2013.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.030 — Application for Wholesale Motor Vehicle Auction General Distinguishing Number

(a) An applicant for an original or renewal wholesale motor vehicle auction general distinguishing number must submit to the department an application that contains:

    (1) the information required by the department;

    (2) information that demonstrates the person meets the requirements prescribed by Section 503.032 (Established and Permanent Place of Business) ; and

    (3) information that demonstrates the applicant has complied with all applicable state laws and municipal ordinances.

(b) Repealed by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135, Sec. 140(2), eff. September 1, 2013.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 140(2), eff. September 1, 2013.*
